items.summary: In CubeVisualization.tsx, configure the global renderer inside onCreated: set gl.toneMapping = THREE.NoToneMapping, gl.autoClear = false, gl.setClearColor(0x000000, 1.0), gl.setClearAlpha(1.0). Do NOT change gl.outputColorSpace and do NOT set gl.toneMappingExposure.

In CubeVisualization.tsx, configure the UnrealBloomPass with intensity: 0.8, radius: 0.65, threshold: 0.1. Add luminanceSmoothing = 0.1 guarded by a feature check: if ('luminanceSmoothing' in bloomPass) { (bloomPass as any).luminanceSmoothing = 0.1; }

In CubeVisualization.tsx, set bloomComposer.renderToScreen = false and finalComposer.renderToScreen = true. Initialize bloomTexture as new THREE.Texture() to prevent startup crashes before the first bloom render.

In CubeVisualization.tsx, replace the composite shader fragment with the full ACES + sharpening + glints implementation: use NaN-safe texel calculation (vec2 texel = 1.0 / max(resolution, vec2(1.0))), sharpen strength 0.15, glint threshold 2.5 and strength 3.0, toneMapACES function, and output gl_FragColor = vec4(mapped, 1.0). Remove HueSaturationPass from the EffectComposer chain. CompositePass must be the final pass in finalComposer.

In CubeVisualization.tsx, implement a robust render loop in useFrame: guard all rendering inside if (sz.width > 0 && sz.height > 0). Inside: (1) renderer.clear(true, true, true), (2) set camera.layers.set(1) then run bloomComposerRef.current.render(), (3) set camera.layers.set(0) then camera.layers.enable(1), (4) update compositePass resolution uniform using sz.width * viewport.dpr and sz.height * viewport.dpr, (5) assign mat.uniforms.bloomTexture.value = bloomComposerRef.current.readBuffer.texture, (6) run finalComposerRef.current.render().

In CubeVisualization.tsx, configure the BackgroundSphere mesh with layers={0} and renderOrder={-1000}. In its fragment shader replace any bare resolution division with: vec2 p = (gl_FragCoord.xy * 2.0 - resolution.xy) / min(max(resolution.x, 1.0), max(resolution.y, 1.0)); to prevent NaN artifacts.

In CubeVisualization.tsx, change the Suspense fallback from null to <color attach="background" args={["#000000"]} /> so the canvas shows a black background during asset loading instead of transparency.
